title: Mrid Hunt
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Mrid Hunt''' was a widely respected sporting event held in the capital city of [[Den Velmor]] on the planet, [[Velmor/Legends|Velmor]]. It was a tradition that extended back several centuries to a time when natives of Velmor were forced to hunt the small [[Mrid]] animals as a means of survival.

[[3 ABY/Legends|Three years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] brought Prince [[Denid]] home after a long exodus so that he might regain his rightful title as [[King/Legends|king]] of Velmor. A Mrid Hunt was held in his honor, and Luke and Denid both participated in the event.

The object of the sport is for the participants to ride atop large, orange frog-like creatures known as [[Ycaqt]]s and track the small, pink Mrids through the forests outside of Den Velmor.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' (1977) 49]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 49}}
